name: algerknown
description: A CLI + React frontend for managing a personal knowledge base with YAML files

scripts.test:phase2:rails: npm run test --workspace=@algerknown/governed -- tests/write tests/domain tests/proposals tests/ports tests/acceptance
scripts.test:phase2:conformance: npm run test --workspace=@algerknown/governed -- tests/conformance tests/sqlite tests/adapters tests/read-models tests/boundary tests/config tests/auth
scripts.test:phase2:boundary: npm run test --workspace=@algerknown/web -- tests/governance tests/auth && npm run test --workspace=@algerknown/cli -- tests/governance && (cd rag-backend && python3 -m pytest tests/test_governance_integration.py tests/test_writer.py -q)
scripts.test:phase2: npm run test:phase2:rails && npm run test:phase2:conformance && npm run test:phase2:boundary && npm run test:phase2:recovery && node scripts/governance/build-acceptance-report.mjs
